title: Immersive Interfaces - EMI
description: This texture pack adds support for EMI, matching its design with the look and feel of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack adds support for EMI, matching its design with the look and feel of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a162f9a350fd05781e8d6c11f7637c1ebd032d6.png) ### After: ![z](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88724a4a5a390938222093429098274c365c466e.png)
